category_sources: source_facts.description says it publishes a site to a git-pages server; official git-pages site describes the official CLI for uploading sites.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official Codeberg repository name use git-pages-cli.
docs_sources: Official git-pages site is the best official documentation surface found and includes CLI upload examples; no separate official CLI docs domain was found.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official Codeberg repository; Homebrew source archive also uses the same Codeberg project path.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.homepage, and official git-pages site describe CLI publishing/deployment to git-pages servers.
